question:
[Previous Feedback] The archived_at fields are not in the correct format. All archive timestamps should follow the standard format, for example: 2026-03-20T17:30:00+08:00. Make sure to update both the archive_summary.archived_at field and all files[].archived_at fields.
Keep this in mind as you continue with the next task.

Please create day05/sprint8_kickoff.json to record preliminary planning information for next week's Sprint 8. Include: sprint_start (next Monday at 09:00), sprint_end (next Friday at 18:00), kickoff_meeting (next Monday at 09:30), and planning_created_at (current time around 10:30).

content.text:
[Tue 2026-03-17 13:08 EDT] [Previous Feedback] The archived_at fields are not in the correct format. All archive timestamps should follow the standard format, for example: 2026-03-20T17:30:00+08:00. Make sure to update both the archive_summary.archived_at field and all files[].archived_at fields.
Keep this in mind as you continue with the next task.

Please create day05/sprint8_kickoff.json to record preliminary planning information for next week's Sprint 8. Include: sprint_start (next Monday at 09:00), sprint_end (next Friday at 18:00), kickoff_meeting (next Monday at 09:30), and planning_created_at (current time around 10:30).

The user is asking me to create a file for Sprint 8 kickoff planning. I need to include:
1. sprint_start: next Monday at 09:00
2. sprint_end: next Friday at 18:00
3. kickoff_meeting: next Monday at 09:30
4. planning_created_at: current time around 10:30

All timestamps should be in the standard ISO 8601 format with +08:00 offset.

Today is Friday, March 20, 2026.
- Next Monday is March 23, 2026
- Next Friday is March 27, 2026

So the timestamps should be:
- sprint_start: 2026-03-23T09:00:00+08:00
- sprint_end: 2026-03-27T18:00:00+08:00
- kickoff_meeting: 2026-03-23T09:30:00+08:00
- planning_created_at: 2026-03-20T10:30:00+08:00 (today at 10:30)

I need to create day05/sprint8_kickoff.json with these values.I'll create the Sprint 8 kickoff planning file with all timestamps in the standard ISO 8601 format.

The file was created successfully. Let me summarize what I did for the user.Done. I've created `day05/sprint8_kickoff.json` with all timestamps in the standard ISO 8601 format:

| Field | Timestamp |
|-------|-----------|
| sprint_start | 2026-03-23T09:00:00+08:00 (next Monday 09:00) |
| sprint_end | 2026-03-27T18:00:00+08:00 (next Friday 18:00) |
| kickoff_meeting | 2026-03-23T09:30:00+08:00 (next Monday 09:30) |
| planning_created_at | 2026-03-20T10:30:00+08:00 (today 10:30) |
